query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'collection_job_history' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'collection_job_history' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
